Interface JasperIHtmlExporter

All Superinterfaces:
JasperIExporter, Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
JasperHtmlExporter
public interface JasperIHtmlExporter extends JasperIExporter

JasperIHtmlExporter interface.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
